name: @stone-js/pipeline
description: Fluent API to add properties and mixins to your JS Class
author: Mr. Stone <pierre.evens16@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run lint && webpack --env prod && npm run types
scripts.build:dev: npm run lint && webpack --env dev && npm run types
scripts.release: npm run test:summary && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.test: npm run lint:test && mocha --experimental-modules --no-warnings -r tests/setup.mjs tests/*.spec.mjs tests/**/*.spec.mjs
scripts.test:html: cross-env NODE_ENV=test nyc --reporter=html --reporter=text npm run test
scripts.test:lcov: cross-env NODE_ENV=test nyc --reporter=lcovonly --reporter=text npm run test
scripts.test:summary: cross-env NODE_ENV=test nyc --reporter=text-summary npm run test
scripts.test:text: cross-env NODE_ENV=test nyc --reporter=text npm run test
